title: How the Kremlin Lures Africans Into Russia’s War in Ukraine
description: A growing number of men across the continent say they are being promised jobs in Russia, only to be forced into the war. Some go as mercenaries, but many more are drawn unwittingly.

title: Why are Africans Fighting in Russia’s War in Ukraine?
description: Some see a clear explanation: Russia needs more troops, and young men in Africa desperately need jobs.
categories: center for strategic and international studies

title: School Cellphone Ban Study Finds Mixed Results
description: Cellphone bans got devices out of students’ hands, according to the first large study. But behavior and academics have not improved, at least so far.

title: Azzi Fudd May Face WNBA Fine for Latest Comments
description: Dallas Wings rookie guard Azzi Fudd was extremely honest about WNBA officiating. Maybe a little too honest.

title: A note to our readers
description: As I begin my first week as POLITICO's Global Editor-in-Chief, I want to start by thanking you — our readers and subscribers — for the trust you place in POLITICO.

title: Knicks’ Josh Hart welcomes repeat of 76ers’ 3-point challenge he aced two years ago
description: When the Knicks faced the 76ers in the playoffs two years ago, Josh Hart was a pivotal factor in the series.
